prompt: A photorealistic, high-quality portrait of a beautiful young {argument name="nationality" default="Japanese"} woman. She has {argument name="hair style" default="long black wavy hair with bangs"}, dark brown eyes, fair skin, and a {argument name="expression" default="gentle smile"} while looking directly at the camera. She is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="simple white blouse"}. The image features soft, flattering portrait lighting and a shallow depth of field, set against a {argument name="background" default="blurred warm indoor setting"} with beautiful bokeh. Shot on an 85mm lens, highly detailed.
translatedPrompt: 一张高度细腻、写实的年轻 {argument name="ethnicity" default="日本"} 女性肖像。她留着 {argument name="hair style" default="带刘海的长黑发"}，拥有白皙无瑕的皮肤和深棕色的大眼睛。她穿着一件 {argument name="clothing" default="简约的白色圆领衬衫"}，面带 {argument name="expression" default="温柔的微笑"}，直视镜头。光线柔和且富有质感，营造出电影般的氛围，具有浅景深效果，背景为 {argument name="background" default="温暖的模糊光斑"}。

breakdown.creativeCore: 年轻女性写实肖像：生成一张高质量、写实的年轻女性特写肖像，支持自定义特征和背景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
